description:
The ParticleLightsModule makes a particle system create lights every so often for emitted particles that follow the particle they're assigned to.

This component is part of the Photon Dust system made by Frooxius.

fields.TemplateLight: The light to use as a template.
fields.LightsRatio: How many lights as a percentage there should be from a 0 to 1 range.
fields.Distribution: How to distribute the lights among the particles being emitted.
fields.MaxLights: The maximum number of lights that the particle system can have.
fields.MultiplyColorByParticle: Whether to multiply the color of the lights by the color of the particle it is attached to.
fields.MultiplyIntensityByAlpha: Whether to multiply the intensity of the lights by the alpha channel of the color of the particle it is attached to.
fields.MultiplyRangeBySize: Whether to multiply the range of the light based on the size of the particle it is attached to.
fields.AngleMultiplier: How to influence the angle of the light based on the angle of the particle it is following.
fields.RangeMultiplier: How much to amplify the range of the light.
fields.IntensityMultiplier: How much to amplify the intensity of the light.

usage: Attach to a slot, add to the list of modules in a ParticleSystem, and adjust the values to make the desired effect from this component.
